examples: The rain and dew from the sky trickle upon your thoraces, and we make our steps on the Chinese soil.
Methods The shape, size, echo, distribution and valve injure of cardiac valve excrescent were detected with echocardiogram by thoraces in 28 cases with infective endocarditis.
Conclusion Echocardiogram by thoraces possess important clinic value in diagnosis, orientation, therapeutic decision-making, estimating prognosis of infective endocarditis valve excrescence.
